description: During a wider grid outage, a community microgrid must safely disconnect from the main grid and operate independently to keep power on for its local customers.

nodes.task_description: The microgrid controller detects the loss of voltage from the main grid.

expected_outcome.value: Controller identifies the start of an upstream outage.

nodes.task_description: The controller automatically opens the main switch, physically disconnecting the microgrid from the surrounding grid.

expected_outcome.value: System successfully and safely islands the microgrid.

nodes.task_description: The controller starts the microgrid's generators and uses its batteries to form a stable, independent grid, restoring power to the local customers.

expected_outcome.value: Microgrid successfully forms its own grid and maintains stable voltage and frequency.
